de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface FunctionalOperationContract

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Contract, OperationContract, SpecificationElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    FunctionalOperationContractImpl

    public interface FunctionalOperationContract
extends OperationContract
    A contract about an operation (i.e., a method or a constructor), consisting of a precondition, a postcondition, a modifies clause, a measured-by clause, and a modality.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        Contract.OriginalVariables

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract
